title: Request
description: Placed run request — portable work plus execution policy plus an explicit placement binding (FR1). request_id is caller correlation, not run identity and not an idempotency key.

manifest.description: Path to work.json beneath the submitted bundle root, never an arbitrary controller path.

sha256.description: Digest of the exact submitted work.json bytes (D5) — no canonical re-encode.

backend.description: Open vocabulary resolved against installed adapters — deliberately NOT an enum (D4).

profile.description: Backend-local logical profile name, not portable work identity.
